title: Fix Module Not Found Error
when_to_apply: When the agent encounters a ModuleNotFoundError or ImportError during execution
instructions: Check if the module is installed — run pip list | grep <module_name>
If missing, install it: pip install <module_name>
If it's a local module, check the import path matches the file structure
Verify __init__.py exists in the package directory
Check for circular imports — move shared imports into function scope if needed
